ddls:
CREATE TABLE "startups" (
  "startup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each startup */,
  "permalink" TEXT /* URL-friendly identifier for the startup */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the startup */,
  "homepage_url" TEXT /* Homepage URL of the startup */,
  "category_list" TEXT /* List of categories the startup belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the startup (e.g., operating, shut down) */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code where the startup is located */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* State code where the startup is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the startup is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the startup is located */,
  "founded_at" TEXT /* Date when the startup was founded */,
  "founder_names" TEXT /* Names of the founders */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the startup */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the startup's logo */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the startup's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("startup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_rounds" (
  "funding_round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding round */,
  "startup_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the startup receiving the funding */,
  "round_permalink" TEXT /* URL-friendly identifier for the funding round */,
  "round_type" TEXT /* Type of funding round (e.g., seed, venture) */,
  "round_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the funding round */,
  "funded_at" TEXT /* Date when the funding was received */,
  "raised_amount_usd" REAL /* Amount raised in USD */,
  "investor_names" TEXT /* Names of investors in this funding round */,
  "funding_stage" TEXT /* Stage of funding (e.g., series A, series B) */,
  "is_lead_investor" INTEGER /* Is the investor a lead investor? */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the funding round's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_rounds_startup_id FOREIGN KEY ("startup_id") REFERENCES startups ("startup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, partner, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view_all_startups, edit_funding_rounds) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the industry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "startup_industries" (
  "startup_industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each startup-industry association */,
  "startup_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the startup */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("startup_industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_startup_industries_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_startup_industries_startup_id FOREIGN KEY ("startup_id") REFERENCES startups ("startup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "news_article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the news article */,
  "published_at" TEXT /* Date when the news article was published */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the news article was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "startup_news_articles" (
  "startup_news_article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each startup-news article association */,
  "startup_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the startup */,
  "news_article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the news article */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("startup_news_article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_startup_news_articles_news_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("news_article_id") REFERENCES news_articles ("news_article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_startup_news_articles_startup_id FOREIGN KEY ("startup_id") REFERENCES startups ("startup_id")
)
